evals.prompt: /lamina — We do not know what problem to solve yet for a mobile budgeting app.
evals.expected_output: Routes to design workflow.

evals.prompt: /lamina — Early exploration: users struggle with household spending visibility.
evals.expected_output: Design workflow for greenfield problem.
assertions: Output does not jump to feature implementation code

evals.prompt: /lamina — Add a wishlist feature to our e-commerce app.
evals.expected_output: Routes to design workflow.
assertions: Output mentions flows or edge cases

evals.prompt: /lamina — Add two-factor authentication to settings.
evals.expected_output: Design workflow dispatch.
assertions: Output does not emit audit output contract headings

evals.prompt: /lamina — Audit our checkout flow for UX issues.
evals.expected_output: Audit workflow dispatch.
assertions: Output includes prioritized or findings language

evals.prompt: /lamina — Redesign our checkout — it has high abandonment.
evals.expected_output: Audit not net-new design — improve existing.
assertions: Output treats this as improving existing UX
Output does not start greenfield design from scratch

evals.prompt: /lamina — Help with form validation UX; users abandon signup.
evals.expected_output: Direct mode to lamina-forms.
assertions: Output discusses forms or validation UX

evals.prompt: /lamina — Users feel lost in navigation.
evals.expected_output: Direct lamina-navigation.

evals.prompt: /lamina — Make our app more accessible for screen reader users.
evals.expected_output: Direct lamina-accessibility.

evals.prompt: /lamina — New users cannot figure out how to get started.
evals.expected_output: Direct lamina-onboarding.

evals.prompt: /lamina — Error messages are confusing and users give up.
evals.expected_output: Direct lamina-error-handling.

evals.prompt: /lamina — Plan a usability study for our onboarding flow.
evals.expected_output: Direct research skill, not full design workflow.
assertions: Output does not emit full design output contract

evals.prompt: /lamina — We need better UX.
evals.expected_output: One clarifying question only.
assertions: Output asks whether this is new UX, existing UX, or a focused UX question

evals.prompt: /lamina-design — Add budgeting alerts feature for college students.
evals.expected_output: Design workflow from natural phrasing.

evals.prompt: /lamina — Audit the forms in our redesign of checkout navigation.
evals.expected_output: Disambiguate audit vs design vs direct.
assertions: Output does not invent UI without grounding
